rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Generated AGREE code must not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
Ensure that expression types (bool, int, real) match the declared types in AGREE.
Do not invent numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type contracts use assume/guarantee syntax; implementation contracts use assign/assert.
Use valid AADL identifiers and types from the model for AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Avoid introducing non-existent AADL property references as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
Event port numeric encoding in AADL
